title: One Block Millionaire
description: Start with just one block of money and break your way to adventure! Earn money, progress, and improve your world.
body:
One Block Millionaire combines the One Block survival challenge with a progression game.

You begin on one block of money floating in the void. Each time you break it, new blocks of money appear.

Expand your island, gather materials, and see how far you can go. Simple to start, fun to replay, and perfect for solo or multiplayer survival.
